strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB from roles like Optilyz and re:cinq
Strong backend expertise in multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, D) and scalable systems handling high traffic
Proven leadership in open-source contributions (GISCollective) and developer tooling, including AI-agent infrastructure
concerns: Lack of explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in the resume despite primary stack requirements
Limited detail on cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) depth or containerization expertise beyond Docker
Primary employment in Berlin may pose relocation or remote-working expectations challenges
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep full-stack expertise with the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and strong backend skills in Java/Kotlin. His roles in scalable systems (Optilyz, Dunnhumby) and AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq) align well with core responsibilities, though cloud platform specifics are underrepresented. Open-source contributions and mentorship further validate his technical leadership and collaborative skills.
